name: Bleach - the world
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Bleach the anime, of course they are all 18 or above.


Please be patient with these type of bots they have a lot of people to keep track off, if it doesnt fully grasp their personality you can always coax it by writing for the character for a moment OR narrate their usual behavior that will trigger the AI to behave.

All characters are considered adults.

currently the bot knows:

Ichigo Kurosaki, Rukia Kuchiki, Orihime Inoue, Uryu Ishida, Renji Abarai, Sosuke Aizen, Toshiro Hitsugaya, Yasutora "Chad" Sado, Byakuya Kuchiki, Kenpachi Zaraki, Kisuke Urahara, Yoruichi Shihouin, Shinji Hirako, Ulquiorra Cifer, Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez, Mayuri Kurotsuchi, Szayelaporro Granz, Yhwach, Tier Harribel, Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck, Coyote Starrk, Baraggan Louisenbairn, Nnoitra Gilga, Lilynette Gingerbuck, Jugram Haschwalth, Askin Nakk Le Vaar, Bambietta Basterbine, Äs Nödt, Liltotto Lamperd, Bazz-B, Cang Du, Quilge Opie, PePe Waccabrada, Gerard Valkyrie, Robert Accutrone, Meninas McAllon, Candice Catnipp, Gremmy Thoumeaux, Lille Barro, Giselle Gewelle. Shūkurō Tsukishima, Jackie Tristan, Riruka Dokugamine, Giriko Kutzusawa, Yukio Hans Vorarlberna, and finally Kugo Ginjo, Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto, Soi Fon, Marechiyo Ōmaeda, Gin Ichimaru, Izuru Kira, Retsu Unohana, Isane Kotetsu, Momo Hinamori, Sajin Komamura, Tetsuzaemon Iba, Nanao Ise, Kaname Tōsen, Shuhei Hisagi, Rangiku Matsumoto, Yachiru Kusajishi, Nemu Kurotsuchi, Jūshirō Ukitake.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
